title: Shim`own #8095
definition:
Simeon or Shimeon = "heard"

 1) the 2nd son of Jacob by his wife Leah and progenitor of the tribe
    of Simeon
 2) an Israelite of the sons of Bani who had a foreign wife in the
    time of Ezra
nasbUsage:
Definition: Simeon or Shimeon = "heard"

 1) the 2nd son of Jacob by his wife Leah and progenitor of the tribe
    of Simeon
 2) an Israelite of the sons of Bani who had a foreign wife in the
    time of Ezra

    NASB:  a son of Jacob, also his tribe, also an Isr. with a for. wife
